name: Grilled Garlic with French Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon olive oil or vegetable oil
1 teaspoon chopped fresh thyme leaves or 1/4 teaspoon dried thyme leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat coals or gas grill to medium heat.
2. Peel loose, paper-like layers from the garlic bulbs without separating the cloves.
3. Place each garlic bulb on a piece of heavy-duty aluminum foil measuring 12 inches by 12 inches.
4. Brush each garlic bulb with oil and sprinkle with thyme.
5. Securely wrap the garlic bulbs in the foil.
6. Grill the wrapped garlic for 25 to 35 minutes, or until the cloves are very soft. Adjust time based on grill temperature.
7. Add the French bread to the side of the grill for the last 5 minutes of grilling, turning once.
8. When the bread is golden brown, serve by squeezing the softened garlic out of its individual cloves onto each slice of bread.
